examples: Do these trees have other means at their disposal to prevent overexposure to light in autumn?
Each year in Canada, more than 80 people die from overexposure to the cold.
I would also add self-induced overexposure to the sun and excessive use of sunbeds to the list.
Venkateshwarlu ticks off the effects of overexposure: diarrhea, nausea, difficulty in breathing, convulsions, headaches and depression.
Investors and experts have both been expressing the need for diversification and lower overexposure to the markets.
